configuration.title: Configuration
configuration.message: Export configurations for core Kong Gateway objects, like services, routes, and plugins, to either YAML or JSON. This allows for straightforward importing into APIOps tools like decK with YAML, or Insomnia and cURL with JSON.

customization.title: Customize before copying to CLI
customization.copy_pat: Make sure to copy your personal access token now. You won't be able to see it again.
customization.reuse_pat: Use an existing PAT if you've already generated one.
